nasb.text: And Moses examined all the work and behold, they had done it; just as the Lord had commanded, this they had done. So Moses blessed them.

esv.text: And Moses saw all the work, and behold, they had done it; as the Lord had commanded, so had they done it. Then Moses blessed them.

cnv.text: 摩西查看了一切工作，見他們所作的，完全是耶和華吩咐的，就給他們祝福。

ccb.text: 摩西察看这一切工作，见他们都是按照耶和华的吩咐做的，就给他们祝福。
